title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates:
IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur Asia Pacific Associates!
